name: Princess Flare Jioral: Birth Of The New Hero
description: Takes place at some point before defeating the demon queen, Keyaru is drugged up and kept like a pet, while you are the newest addition to the party. Whether you decide to get into Flare’s good graces and enjoy the questing with your new party, or stand against her, attempt to save Keyaru from his torment and create a better ending is up to you.
creator: Qjfavf
